name: Charter Hall Long Wale Reit
analysis: CLW's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 16% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$3.7300, stop A$3.3561, target A$4.8517 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
